content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Portfolio is already 79% deployed with minimal remaining capacity (INR 14k). Market showing broad strength across pharma, power, FMCG, and financials but VIX elevated at 18.45 indicates volatility. Priority is position management: setting proper SLs on held positions (all showing 0.00 SL which is a risk gap) and locking in gains on winners near resistance.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 FY26 blowout (+35% PAT YoY, record numbers, best-in-class asset quality). Thesis intact despite -4.7% unrealized. Setting SL at 74 (below recent swing low of 72.31 on 20-Apr + buffer) and target 88 (above 52w high breakout). Risk ~4.7%, reward ~13%, R:R ~1:2.7."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 print, GNPA below 1% for first time, multiple analyst upgrades (ICICI Sec TP Rs 1,350). Already +1.9%. Trailing SL to 955 (just below today's low 981 with buffer) locks in near-breakeven. Target 1140 near 52w high. R:R favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge position. SL at 119 (~4.3% below CMP) protects against further gold weakness. Target 135 on Goldman's bullish long-term view. Keeping as portfolio hedge given VIX elevated."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Breakout above 52w high (1640) with volume 2.3x. Position up +3.2%. Trailing SL to 1620 (below breakout level) locks in small gain/breakeven. Target 1820 on summer demand theme + Nabha acquisition. R:R ~1:1.4."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 blowout (+27% PAT, 18% volume growth). Stock at fresh 52w high. SL at 1355 (~4% below CMP, below today's low 1382 with buffer). Target 1520. Quality FMCG defensive play."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1160.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 business update (+22.8% deposits, +25.1% advances, peer-leading). Board meeting/results Apr 27 is binary catalyst within max hold. SL at 1015 (below today's low 1035). Target 1160 on analyst consensus range."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "new_target": 745.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Volume surge 3.7x, breakout above 52w high. Q4 results Apr 29. Consensus analyst TPs Rs 700-750. SL at 655 (below today's low 670). Tariff exemption for generics is tailwind. R:R ~1:1.8."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2300.00,
      "new_target": 2560.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive rotation. Q4 results Apr 30. UBS Buy reiteration. SL at 2300 (~3.3% below CMP, below today's low 2336 with buffer). Target 2560 mid of analyst range."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Summer demand theme, capacity milestone 89,528 MW, Q4 results May 15. Breakout above 52w range. SL at 388 (below S1 389 / recent swing). Target 435 on recovery toward prior high. Defensive power exposure."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "new_target": 240.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Fresh ATH, +28% YTD, largest Adani co. Q4 results Apr 29. However Shooting Star pattern 20-Apr + Q3 PAT -18.89% YoY are caution flags. SL at 202 (just below today's low 212 with buffer gives room; actually using 202 below pivot). Target 240. Position small."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DRREDDY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Citi Sell with TP Rs 1,070 (below CMP), Brazil ANVISA rejection, Morgan Stanley cut FY26 EPS estimate, -5.7% in 1 month. Despite today's bounce, setup is bearish. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AUROPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Buyback record date (17-Apr) has passed - no tendering upside for fresh buyers. Stock at 1439 vs buyback Rs 1475 suggests partial acceptance pricing. Post-buyback window close 29-Apr can see sell-off (Aug-24 precedent). Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PIRAMALFIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Already up +12.7% today, chasing a parabolic move. Governance concerns (Director resignation + back-to-back restructurings). MACD showed bearish crossover before today's spike. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIENSOL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Already have ADANIPOWER + TORNTPOWER + NTPC in power cluster. Adding another power name violates cluster discipline. Q4 call tomorrow is binary risk after +9.84% move today. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DEEPAKNTR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Prabhudas Lilladher REDUCE with TP Rs 1,354 (below CMP). Chase-territory after +12.88% gap up with no clear catalyst. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CIPLA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Already have GRANULES in pharma; no urgent need to add another. Limited remaining capital. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DATAPATTNS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "+20.18% in a single day is chase-territory. No deep data provided. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Falling knife near 52w low ahead of INFY results tonight. IT sector direction binary. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INFY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Results at 3:45 PM today - pre-event entry not advisable. Will reassess tomorrow."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "OFSS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Already up +9.06% today on results. Capital constrained. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Already have HINDUNILVR + NESTLEIND in FMCG cluster. No room to add. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RVNL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Capital constrained (only INR 14k remaining deployable). Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "JIOFINL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Already have PNBHOUSING + AUBANK in financials cluster. Capital tight. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Already have NTPC + ADANIPOWER + TORNTPOWER in energy/power cluster. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Despite -4.7% drawdown, Q4 fundamentals are outstanding. Giving thesis room with SL at 74 below recent swing."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in near-breakeven after strong earnings move; target 1140."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; wide SL to let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock profit; SL just below 52w breakout level."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 blowout thesis; SL below today's low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "reasoning": "Results Apr 27 binary; SL below today's low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout with volume; SL below today's low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2300.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 Apr 30; defensive FMCG."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Long runway; summer demand + Q4 May 15."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "reasoning": "ATH + shooting star = caution; lock in small cushion."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "INFY post-result tomorrow will set IT direction - revisit HCLTECH/OFSS post open. AUROPHARMA post-buyback (29-Apr) may offer cleaner entry. DATAPATTNS defense theme to watch after consolidation. RVNL and JIOFINL to reconsider once capital frees up.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily deployed at 79% - at hysteresis threshold per philosophy. Focus shifts to position management over new entries. Power cluster (ADANIPOWER+TORNTPOWER+NTPC) at ~13% of capital is approaching cluster limit. Multiple Q4 result catalysts land in next 7 days (AUBANK Apr 27, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, GRANULES Apr 29, NESTLEIND done, HINDUNILVR Apr 30, NTPC May 15) - any blowup triggers SLs. VIX at 18.45 warrants caution on new adds."
}
